name: Blade
desc: A member of the Stellaron Hunters, and a swordsman who abandoned his body to become a blade.\nPledges loyalty to "Destiny's Slave," and possesses a terrifying self-healing ability.

1.name: Blade Cuts the Deepest in Hell
1.desc: Blade's Ultimate deals additionally increased DMG to one designated enemy target, with the increased amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the tally of Blade's HP loss in the current battle.\nThe tally of Blade's HP loss in the current battle is capped at <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP. The tally value will be reset and re-accumulated after his Ultimate has been used.

2.name: Ten Thousand Sorrows From One Broken Dream
2.desc: When Blade is in the Hellscape state, his CRIT Rate increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Hardened Blade Bleeds Coldest Shade
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Rejected by Death, Infected With Life
4.desc: When Blade's current HP percentage drops to <unbreak>50%</unbreak> or lower of his Max HP, increases his Max HP by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Stacks up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

5.name: Death By Ten Lords' Gaze
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Reborn Into an Empty Husk
6.desc: The maximum number of Charge stacks is reduced to 4. The <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> triggered by Talent deals additionally increased DMG, with the increased amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Blade's Max HP.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

120501.name: Shard Sword
120501.desc: Deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Blade's ATK as Wind DMG to a target enemy.
120501.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to an enemy.

120502.name: Hellscape
120502.desc:
Consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Blade's Max HP to enter the Hellscape state.
When Hellscape is active, his Skill cannot be used, his DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, and his Basic ATK Shard Sword is enhanced to Forest of Swords for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
If Blade's current HP is insufficient, his HP will be reduced to 1 when he uses his Skill.
This Skill does not regenerate Energy. Using this Skill does not end the current turn.
120502.simple_desc: Consumes HP to <color=#f29e38ff>Enhance Basic ATK</color>, and this turn does not end after this Skill is used.

120503.name: Death Sentence
120503.desc: Sets Blade's current HP to <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of his Max HP and deals Wind DMG to one enemy equal to the sum of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK, <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP, and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of the tally of Blade's HP loss in the current battle. At the same time, deals Wind DMG to adjacent targets equal to the sum of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK, <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP, and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> of the tally of his HP loss in the current battle.\nThe tally of Blade's HP loss in the current battle is capped at <unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP. This value will be reset and re-accumulated after his Ultimate has been used.
120503.simple_desc: Sets current HP to <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of Max HP, and deals massive Wind DMG to one enemy and Wind DMG to adjacent targets.

120504.name: Shuhu's Gift
120504.desc: When Blade sustains DMG or consumes his HP, he gains 1 stack of Charge, stacking up to 5 times. A max of 1 Charge stack can be gained every time he is attacked.\nWhen Charge stack reaches maximum, immediately launches a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> on all enemies, dealing Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Blade's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP. At the same time, restores Blade's HP by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP. After the Follow-Up ATK, all Charges are consumed.
120504.simple_desc: When Blade's HP decreases, gains 1 stack of Charge. Upon reaching maximum Charge, launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, <color=#f29e38ff>dealing Wind DMG to all enemies</color>, restoring HP, and consuming all Charges.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

120506.name: Attack
120506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120507.name: Karma Wind
120507.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering combat, consumes <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Blade's Max HP while dealing Wind DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP to all enemies.\nIf Blade's current HP is insufficient, his HP will be reduced to 1 when this Technique is used.
120507.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering combat, consumes own HP and deals Wind DMG to all enemies.

120508.name: Forest of Swords
120508.desc: Consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Blade's Max HP and deals Wind DMG equal to the sum of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP to one designated enemy. In addition, deals Wind DMG equal to the sum of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Blade's ATK and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP to adjacent targets.\nIf Blade's current HP is insufficient, his HP will be reduced to 1 when using "Forest of Swords."\n"Forest of Swords" cannot regenerate Skill Points.
120508.simple_desc: Consumes HP and deals Wind DMG to an enemy, as well as minor Wind DMG to adjacent targets.

1.point_desc: When Blade's current HP percentage is at <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of Max HP or lower, the HP restored when receiving healing increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
If Blade hits a <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy after using "Forest of Swords," he will restore HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP plus <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

1.point_desc: Increases DMG dealt by the Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

descs: Abilities now deal DMG based on <color=#f29e38ff>Max HP</color>
The Talent-triggered Follow-Up ATK <color=#f29e38ff>additionally regenerates Energy</color>
After using Skill, <color=#f29e38ff>increases this unit's Aggro Chance</color>

1.name: Blade Cuts the Deepest in Hell
1.desc: Enhanced Basic ATK and Ultimate deal additionally increased DMG to one designated enemy, with the increased amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the tally of HP loss from Ultimate.

2.name: Ten Thousand Sorrows From One Broken Dream
2.desc: When Blade is in the "Hellscape" state, his CRIT Rate increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Hardened Blade Bleeds Coldest Shade
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Rejected by Death, Infected With Life
4.desc: When Blade's current HP percentage drops from above <unbreak>50%</unbreak> to <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of his Max HP or lower, increases his Max HP by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Stacks up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

5.name: Death By Ten Lords' Gaze
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Reborn Into an Empty Husk
6.desc: The maximum number of Charge stacks is reduced to 4. The <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> triggered by Talent deals additionally increased DMG, with the increased amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Blade's Max HP.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1120501.name: Shard Sword
1120501.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Blade's Max HP to one designated enemy.
1120501.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy.

1120502.name: Hellscape
1120502.desc:
Consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Blade's Max HP to enter the "Hellscape" state.
While "Hellscape" is active, his Skill cannot be used, his DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, his chance of getting attacked by enemy targets greatly increases, and his Basic ATK "Shard Sword" is enhanced to "Forest of Swords" for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
If Blade's current HP is insufficient, his HP will be reduced to 1 when he uses his Skill.
This Skill does not regenerate Energy. Using this Skill does not end the current turn.
1120502.simple_desc: Consumes HP to <color=#f29e38ff>enhance Basic ATK</color>. Increases the chance of getting attacked. And this turn does not end after this Skill is used.

1120503.name: Death Sentence
1120503.desc: Sets Blade's current HP to <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of his Max HP and deals Wind DMG to one enemy equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of the tally of Blade's HP loss in the current battle. At the same time, deals Wind DMG to adjacent targets equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> of the tally of his HP loss in the current battle.\nThe tally of Blade's HP loss in the current battle is capped at <unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP. This value will be reset and re-accumulated after his Ultimate has been used.
1120503.simple_desc: Sets current HP to <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of Max HP. Deals massive Wind DMG to one enemy and Wind DMG to adjacent targets.

1120504.name: Shuhu's Gift
1120504.desc: When Blade sustains DMG or consumes his HP, he gains 1 stack of Charge, stacking up to 5 times. A max of 1 Charge stack can be gained every time he is attacked.\nWhen Charge stack reaches maximum, immediately launches 1 instance of <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> on all enemies, dealing Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Blade's Max HP. At the same time, restores Blade's HP by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP. After the Follow-Up ATK, all Charges are consumed.
1120504.simple_desc: When Blade's HP decreases, gains 1 stack of Charge. Upon reaching maximum Charge, launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, <color=#f29e38ff>dealing Wind DMG to all enemies</color>, restoring HP, and consuming all Charges.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1120506.name: Attack
1120506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

1120507.name: Karma Wind
1120507.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering combat, consumes <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Blade's Max HP while dealing Wind DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP to all enemies.\nIf Blade's current HP is insufficient, his HP will be reduced to 1 when this Technique is used.
1120507.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering combat, consumes own HP and deals Wind DMG to all enemies.

1120508.name: Forest of Swords
1120508.desc: Consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Blade's Max HP and deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP to one designated enemy. In addition, deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Blade's Max HP to adjacent targets.\nIf Blade's current HP is insufficient, his HP will be reduced to 1 when using "Forest of Swords."\n"Forest of Swords" cannot regenerate Skill Points.
1120508.simple_desc: Consumes own HP and deals Wind DMG to one enemy, as well as minor Wind DMG to adjacent targets.

1.point_desc: When Blade uses Ultimate, the amount cleared from the tally of HP loss is changed to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
HP restored from healing increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. After receiving healing, converts <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the healed amount to Ultimate's tally of HP loss.
Increases <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> DMG from Talent by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and additionally regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.
